title: SHARDOR Burr Coffee Grinder Electric with 32 Grinding Sizes, Coffee Grinders for Home Use with 40 Seconds Adjustable Electronic Timer, Coffee Bean Grinder with Chamber Cleaning Button
description:
About this item
[Uniform Coffee Grounds] Metal flat burr coffee grinder produces more uniform coffee grounds, preserving the full flavor of the coffee
[Precision Electronic Timer] Adjustable 40s digital timer allows precise and stable coffee grinding. Choose grinding time as needed and stop grinding with a single press
[32 Precise Grind Size Settings] From the finest espresso to the coarsest french press, suit your all grinding needs
[Easy to Clean] Removable Upper Burr, Bean Hopper,Chamber, convenient cleaning with the grounds chamber cleaning button and the included small brush
[Compact & Tiny Design] Compact electric burr grinder saves space efficiently
reviews_5s:
Grinds beans very efficiently, the unit is quiet and the price is right!!I love how compact it is for my camper. It doesn’t take up too much room. It does make a mess but if you’re careful enough you can manage to not. I would for sure recommend it to family and friends though. My mom bought one as well and she likes it too.I am replacing another Shardor grinder CG 835B that the burrs got dull causing it to jam constantly, it was just over 2 years old.
in the picture you can sè the courser grind og the CG835 on the bottom of the ground beans container. this was from approximately the same frind setting.
This one is much quieter and grinds much finer. The bin it grinds into is smaller but I like that. so Far it is a much better grinder . The only issue I can see is that I could not contact Shardor when I wanted to replace the burrs in my CG835B. so I am worried about customer service in the future. None of their web pages worked.This is a great grinder. Works great for small and large grinds and is surprisingly quietGreat grinder for whole beans. Has lots of setting to cusomize your blendCompared to the old grinder I used to have this model is a lot quieter. Although it does not hold as many beans it does a great job of grinding coffee beans.I love this grinder. It’s compact yet I can leave it on the counter ready for the next grind. It makes me feel a little extra special at an affordable price.Works great with lots of variation on the grind level.THIS THING IS SO QUIET!!!
it works like a charm and is so quiet! doubt it would even wake a sleeping baby... The max 40 seconds is perfect for me as just the amount I like to make for a pot of coffee. super easy, one press and grounds are ready. I just love this purchase! good job Shardor!Idéntico a la foto. Funciona excelente , fácil de utilizar.
reviews_1s: This burr grinder is not worth 1 (one) star. It makes the biggest mess when trying to empty ground coffee or taking apart to clean. I previously had a Cuisinart burr grinder and now wish I had purchased another. I saw this one and the reviews were good and price was great. It does not grind evenly. You will get coarse grinds along with powdery/powder grinds no matter the setting. Trust me, it's a real "bummer."Don't be fooled. It cannot grind for espresso. To get an espresso-like grind, one must run the beans through, then take the ground beans and run them through 3-4 more additional times to get something close to espresso. Wish I could return it.Grinder jammed on first use. Aperture for grinds passing to hopper about the size of a single coffee bean. Ridiculous. Consistency of ground coffee bad. Could not get it back in box fast enough.Beans don’t filter through, top doesn’t fit for some reason.Couldn't get it to work.Made a mess every time. Returned it.Every time I use this machine, I ended up with a big mess on the countertop and inside the mechanism. Not all the coffee that was ground ended up in the container, even after solid placement. Static electricity was a problem both inside and outside the grounds container.
